title: festuca ovina subvar. scabrifolia
intro: Festuca ovina subvar. scabrifolia, also known as scabrous sheep's fescue, is a type of grass native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subvar. scabrifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as an infusion or decoction, or used topically in the form of a salve or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
